mapper.sql: id, orderNo, userId, goodsId, imgUrl, goodsNum, goodsName, goodsPrice, style, color, size, categoryId, createdDate
mapper.insert: insert into order_detail (id, orderNo, userId, goodsId, imgUrl, goodsNum, goodsName, goodsPrice, style, color, size, categoryId, createdDate) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into order_detail
id,
orderNo,
userId,
goodsId,
imgUrl,
goodsNum,
goodsName,
goodsPrice,
style,
color,
size,
categoryId,
createdDate,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{goodsPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update order_detail
orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsNum = #{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goodsName = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
goodsPrice = #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER},
style = #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
color = #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
size = #{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
categoryId = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update order_detail set orderNo = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, goodsId = #{goodsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, imgUrl = #{imgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goodsNum = #{goodsNum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goodsName = #{goodsName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, goodsPrice = #{goodsPrice,jdbcType=INTEGER}, style = #{style,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, color = #{color,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, size = #{size,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, categoryId = #{categoryId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, createdDate = #{createdDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select goodsId, goodsName, imgUrl, style, color, size, concat(goodsPrice,'') as goodsPrice, goodsNum from order_detail where userId = #{userId} and orderNo = #{orderNo}
